items.name_en: ❤️B-brand pure original check coated canvas tote bag. The body is crafted from brand vintage check eco-canvas + smooth Italian tanned leather, featuring eye-catching decorative check print and contrast topstitching. The material is known for being very wear-resistant and durable, with a low-key and beautiful pattern. The texture is particularly comfortable, and the overall look is very high-end. It comes with a leather-wrapped mirror charm, very low-key yet distinctive. Open top design with a lobster clasp, black canvas lining with patch pocket and zippered interior pocket. Large capacity, practicality is self-evident, and it is comfortable to carry. A favorite for travel and commuting, looks good however you carry it. It has a unique lazy retro style, a must-have for street style. Plus, this bag is particularly durable, dirt-resistant, and timeless. It looks very elegant when worn, a very practical style suitable for all seasons. Don't miss out! Sisters, go for it! Dimensions: 34X28X14cm

items.name_en: ❤Burberry Pure Original London Check Eco-Canvas and Leather Tote Bag. Inspired by vintage totes, made from durable eco-canvas with a structured shape. Waterproof, scratch-resistant, and wear-resistant. The classic check is easy to clean and resists fading. Features smooth cowhide trim and refined white stitching! This color combination is stunning. The bag is eye-catching and super practical. Features a front magnetic flap pocket with the brand lettering logo. Open top with a zippered interior pocket. Extra-large capacity. Can be carried by the reinforced top handle or with a detachable shoulder strap. A low-key appearance with premium texture, offering a subtle luxury feel. Lightweight and easy to match. A perfect everyday bag that combines practicality and style. You can't go wrong with this!
items.name_cn:

Dimensions: 23 x 6 x 26.5cm

items.name_en: ❤️Envelope Bag with Flap and Patchwork Leather, Shoulder/Crossbody Bag. Body made of Brand Vintage Retro Check Eco-friendly Canvas + Smooth Italian Tanned Leather. Eye-catching check print and contrasting topstitching, stiff and structured material, super eye-catching. Looks very high-end, the patchwork leather fully interprets the brand's British style! Design inspired by Trench coat collar shape, named after founder Thomas Bur's wife Catherine. Minimalist square style with a special design, very low-key yet identifiable. Snap button closure on both sides of the flap, decent capacity for daily needs, adjustable shoulder strap, versatile use, looks good in any style, can also be used as a clutch. Really great, very versatile for work or outings, suitable for all seasons, highly recommended! Dimensions: 24X17.5X5.5cm
items.name_cn: ❤️Envelope Bag with Flap and Patchwork Leather, Shoulder/Crossbody Bag. Body made of Brand Vintage Retro Check Eco-friendly Canvas + Smooth Italian Tanned Leather. items.name_en: ❤️LolaTB Plush Wool Blend Tote Bag, crafted from Italian fine-gauge cotton and plush wool blend tweed for durability and a rich atmosphere. Features a signature plaid pattern with quilting and padding for a soft, pillow-like feel. Front Thomas logo, sleek modern silhouette, and adjustable gold chain strap for shoulder or crossbody wear. Hidden magnetic closure, card slot, and lightweight design. Stylish and versatile.

items.name_en: ❤️Loro piana Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
❤️Loro piana Bucket Bag
Bale Mini Bag
Color: Midnight Blue
Bale's effortless elegance and timeless style once again witness Loro piana's unique heritage. The square shape and name originate from the large bales used to store cashmere, representing Loro piana's commitment to exquisite craftsmanship. The body is made of calfskin with a very soft natural grain.
Size: 16✖️14✖️23CM
